metadata.description: Plugins from Ellypsis Labs - knowledge work systems for Claude Code and Cowork.

plugins.name: mcp-eval
plugins.description: Evaluate MCP servers for production readiness. Test tools, measure token costs, grade responses, generate visual reports. Four-stage pipeline (init -> run/capture -> grade -> report) covering HTTP, stdio, and OAuth-integration MCP servers.

plugins.name: sia
plugins.description: Sales intelligence coworker by Ellypsis. Research companies, find contacts, draft outreach, and work your CRM — the operational depth is served per-company through the Ellypsis gateway.

plugins.name: scout
plugins.description: An Ellypsis coworker example — a generic researcher that gathers companies and contacts and logs them to a Google Sheet workbook. One clean loop (research / find contacts / log), illustrative not exhaustive. Generic shape of the SIA pattern, fictional ICP, public from day one.
